info.title: DuckDB Accelerated DB Layer API
info.description: High-performance analytical layer over MySQL databases using Sequential Appender architecture. Delivers 5-10x faster queries with zero application changes required.

tags.name: Health & Monitoring
tags.description: System health checks and status endpoints

tags.name: Automation & Recovery
tags.description: Automated cleanup, backup, and recovery operations

tags.name: WebSocket API
tags.description: High-performance WebSocket API for real-time queries (10,000+ queries/second)

get.description: Check database connectivity and system health
Detailed system status with table counts and metrics

Perform an incremental update from MySQL to DuckDB (only changed records)
Synchronize a single table from MySQL to DuckDB

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: Name of the table to sync

get.description: Get current sync state and recent logs from sync_metadata table
Compare record counts between MySQL and DuckDB to verify sync accuracy
Get storage statistics including size, file counts, and partition info
Get partition information for a specific table

delete.description: Delete partitions older than specified retention period

get.description: Get health status of all DuckDB views

parameters.description: Name of the table/view to repair

parameters.name: tableName
parameters.description: Name of the table/view to refresh

delete.description: Remove views that no longer have backing data files

Get paginated table data

Get table classification info (dimension/fact/metadata)

Check if a database file is compatible for migration
